# [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use execute-tool...
Folder: cron

assistant: WAKEUP_OK
user: [T7a approve-phase1] In a single response, call BOTH at the same time: (1) execute-tool with toolName='tool-help' and instanceId='hermes' to list available tools, and (2) execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'approve-test'}. The generate_image tool requires user confirmation - it should NOT execute yet. End your reply with STEP_OK after the tool calls.
assistant:

assistant: The async remote task has completed. All tool results from the previous step are now available in the context above.
user: [T8 parallel-tools] In a single response, call BOTH at the same time: (1) execute-tool with toolName='tool-help', instanceId='hermes', callbackMode='wait' to list available tools, and (2) execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'green square'}, callbackMode='wait'. IMPORTANT: You MUST use callbackMode='wait' for both tools - do NOT use wakeUp or detach. Check that tool-help returned a non-empty tools array and generate_image returned an imageUrl (not a t

user: [T9 preCalls] An image was already generated for you before this message. Look at the execute-tool tool result in your context and report the imageUrl you see. End your reply with STEP_OK if you can see an imageUrl starting with 'https://images.unsplash.com', or FAILED: <reason> if no imageUrl was visible in the tool result.
